components.bonus: Gain 20% Top Speed while shields are depleted
Tenno gain 500 overshields after being launched from the Slingshot
Equipping Lavan Hull Plating increases max Shields by 25%.
Tenno gain 50% Damage increase for 5s after being launched from the Slingshot
Gain 1000% of Energy consumed using Battle Mods is converted to Shields
Gain 50% boost speed while shield depleted
Intruders on the Railjack will have their Armor reduced by 10%
Gain 100% damage immunity duration after a Major Breach is repaired
Tenno gain 50% Speed Boost for 5s when deploying their Archwing
30% of Shield Damage is diverted to increase Turret Damage by up to 300 for the next shot fired
Redirect 50 Energy to Shields with every kill
Every 10s, shields apply an Electrical proc to all enemies within 50m
Shields regenerate 50% faster when Railjack is stationary
Tenno gain 20% weapon damage onboard Railjack
50% chance that an Electric Hazard will repair automatically after 5s
50% chance that a Fire Hazard will repair automatically after 5s
50% chance that an Ice Hazard will repair automatically after 5s
Gain 25% Railjack damage while shield depleted
Gain 50% Movement Speed for 10 seconds after repairing
Heal all teammates for 1000 Health when this crew member drops below 30% Health
Increase Critical Damage by 300% while Health is below 50%
Activates a protective shield when taking near lethal damage
Killing an enemy heals all nearby allies by 500 over 10 seconds

versionLog.summary: Introduced to the new Warframe completion tracker.
versionLog.details:
Introduced to the new Warframe completion tracker. 
This base version includes tracking of the following:
     - Quest
     - Gear
     - Kuva/Tenet Weapons
     - Incarnons
     - Arcanes
     - Mods
     - Subsumes
     - Railjack
     - Modular Gear
     - Relics
     - Cosmetics
     - Collectables
     - Decorations
     - Codex
     - Market
     - Extra
Recent Changes before the Alpha release include:
     - Optimised conditional formatting in multiple pages, reducing formulas in 1 area from 32 formulas down to 4
     - Version Log established
     - Console exclusive cosmetics added
     - Typos located & fixed
     - Added error checking to % formulas to avoid DIV or NA errors
     - Hidden 2 uneeded pages used for the design of the sheet
     - Most recent warframe update (Lotus Eaters) items & quest added
     - General visual cleanup
     - Testing data removed in preperation for use
     - Some areas drop down lists were added to reduce chance of user error breaking tracking
     - Syndicates added
     - Added hyperlinks to main page catagories so you can click and be taken to the section without searching for it

                           Meso A7, Meso H7, Meso N17, Lith G12, Lith N15, Lith W4, Lith C12

Additional:

     - Empyrean Vignette Added
     - Corpus Interior Decoration added
     - Added credits on main page
     - Verglas Prime added to gear
     - General Format improvements

Flawed Mod Update
Codex updates:

Mods Added:

       Flawed Chilling Grasp, Flawed Cleanse Corpus, Flawed Cleanse Grineer, Flawed Cleanse Infested
       Flawed Concussion Rounds, Flawed Contagious Spread, Flawed Cryo Rounds, Flawed Diamond Skin
       Flawed Disruptor, Flawed Expel Infested, Flawed Flechette, Flawed Heavy Impact, Flawed Heavy Trauma
       Flawed Hell's Chamber, Flawed Insulation, Flawed Intruder, Flaed Jagged Edge, Flawed Lightning Rod
       Flawed Maglev, Flawed Melee Prowess, Flawed Metal Auger, Flawed No Return, Flawed Parry
       Flawed Piercing Hit, Flawed Point Strike, Flawed Power Throw, Flawed Provoked, Flawed Quick Thinking
       Flawed Ravage, Flawed Reflection, Flawed Rupture, Flawed Sawtooth Clip, Flawed Seeker
       Flawed Seeking Force, Flawed Shotgun Savvy, Flawed Shredder, Flawed Smite Corpus, Flawed Smite Infested

Additional:

COMPLETE COLLECTABLE TAB REWORK
Glyphs:
     - Found mass amount missing - CGS_Knackie, Community Dog Days Grendel, Community Dog Days Lavos,   
       Community Dog Days Voruna, Community Dog Days Yareil, Conquera V, Cephalon Simaris, Dante Caantist - Bright,
       Dante Cantist - Dark, Dante - Bright, Dante - Dark, Dog Days, Vome, Goku707, Cephalon Cy, Daughter Tennobaum, 
       Father Tennobaum, Frost Tennobaum, Grandmother Tennobaum, Kahl-175 Tennobaum, Kubrow Tennobaum, 
       Maggot Prime Tennobaum, MOA Tennobaum, Mother Tennobaum, Necraloid Tennobaum, Son Tennobaum, 
       Vauban Tennobaum, Veso-R Tennobaum, Vulpaphyla Tennobaum, Zephyr Tennobaum, Cookie Grineer, 
       Cookie Dethcube, Cookie Corpus, Cookie Void Key, Cookie Lotus, Cookie Excalibur, Cookie Fortuna, 
       Cookie K-Drive, Cookie Nef Anyo, Cookie Orb Vallis, Cookie Stalker, Conthrathermal Companion, Deca Heirloom, 
       Dog Days Kubrow, Dog Days Kavat, Feasting Hamster, Bird 3 Sketch, Fibonacci Sketch, Tennocon Crit, 
       Tennocon 2017, Tennocon 2018, Tennocon 2019, Tennocon 2020, Tennocon 2021, Tennocon 2022, Tennocon 2023,
       Tennocon 2024, Tennocon 2019 Sanctuary Showcase, TennoTrivia 2020, Excalibur Dex in Action, 
       Ten Year Anniversary Week 1, Ten Year Anniversary Week 2, Ten Year Anniversary Week 3, 
       Ten Year Anniversary Week 4, Ten Year Anniversary Week 5, Hoku Props (OLD), InexpensiveGamer, Jahu, Khra, 
       Lavos in Action, Lohk, Lok King Macho, Lotus Symbol, Netra, Pride I, Pride II, Pride III, Reddit, Rhino Deathwatch,
       Ris, Sevagoth Glaukus, Sevagoth In Action, Star Days Grineer, Styanex Tonatiuh, Suplex Kubrow (UNKNOWN), 
       Tagfer Sketch, Trinity, Valkyr Carnivex, Volt, Vome-Fass, Winter XIV, Winter XV, Winter XVI, Winter XVII, 
       Winter XVIII, Wisp Motes, Wisp Somnium, Wukong Samadhi In Action, Xata, Yareli In Action, Yareli Pandea, 
       Year Eleven Anniversary, Gara
     - Multiple glyphs removed from normal tracking and added to 'old unobtainable glyphs'
     - Improved conditional formatting for glyphs page
     - 2 Glyphs renamed, wiki was incorrect
Codex:
     - Prex codex had incorrect entries, resolved.
     - Renamed incorrectly named segment
     - Duplicate entries removed
     - 5 fragments incorrectly named, fixed
Emblems:
     - Section added into Collectables, conditional formatting and formulas all updated across the spreadsheet to reflect this
Additional:
     - Fixed a range issue in Extra tab incorrectly counting the wrong cells
     - Pride Display I & II added to decorations
     - Waverider quest added
     - Captura Scenes added Granum Void, Grineer Galleon Cargo, Infested Ship Hologram, Sentient Balcony, Teshin's Cave
     - Vayas Prime operator accessories added
     - Changed Verv sigil, emblem, redeemer, atelia syandana, ifrit kubrow armor, sentrex stencil, rubico skin as well as
        Prominence sigil and tigris skin have been changed from OLD items that were locked from tracking to current
        as they have been brought into the aya store in rotation
     - Added Trinity, Volt, Mag & Excalibur mask found from Nakak in Cetus
     - Added Deathmark shoulder armor, Reckoning oculus, earpiece & mask as well as stalker in action glyph. Additionally 
       Stalkers mark sumdali. Lasty newest mods Burning Hate & Unseen Dread were added
     - Added Scattering Strike & Weakening Strike

versionLog.description: First Wave of user response fixes
versionLog.details:
Response Fixes to feedback
Quests:
     - Added all side & frame quests
Gear:
     - Exalted Prime Blade included in founder items instead of default gear
Modular Gear:
     - 3 Missing Loaders added
     - Fixed up design of page
Blueprints:
     - Duplicate entries removed
     - Chroma Neuroptics Added
Cosmetics:
     - Hespar Lunaeus, Mirage Nuwa, Boltor Lunaeus, Moondance Kavat, Cordmade Sugatra, Rapier Tributaker added
Collectable:
     - Excalibur prime glyphs fixed to be only founder
     - Community On-Lyne glyphs added
     - Heavon Stones ephemera added
     - Lunar Renewal Snake sigil added
Decorations:
     - Charming snake floof added
Additional:
     - Typos fixed, in multiple tabs
     - MASSIVE lists of small fixes thanks to Rvban and the document provided 
       (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Q-wMuNHwEo7IzEHOBXis7iK0fjBZqGF1/view?usp=sharing
        https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zOgPj9Q_qpqtT01NWguSWx6v9KoWrSSu/view?usp=sharing)
     - Massive list of prime part blueprints added (tripple checked)
     - Conditional formatting optimised in gear tab
     - Login music moved over to codex with somacord & added all missing login music

versionLog.summary: Coda lich update & Large Scale sheet reword
versionLog.details:
Coda lich update & Large Scale sheet reword
Gear:
     - All coda weapons and new 1999 weapons added
     - Some gear was not being tracked, Rectified
     - Psuedo Exalted changes reflected in tab
Lich Gear:
     - Coda Gear Added
     - Elemental Collection REMOVED due to item of 'elemental vice making it redundant'
Mods:
     - Requiem, Antiviral & Potency mods added as rank 1 mods for collection sake
Relics:
     - Relics brought up to date
Blueprint:
     - 1999 Weapon blueprints added
     - Equinox Day/Night missing blueprints added
Items:
     - Fully reworked Tab with mass amounts of new items to track
Cosmetics:
     - Coda Cosmetics Added
Collectable:
     - Coda Ephemeras added
     - Year 12 anniversary collectable items added
Decorations:
     - Coda Decorations Added
     - Missing Tennocon 2023 display added
     - Missing Zariman Kitchen Boiler added
Market:
     - Conditional formatting added
     - New setting added
     - Description reworked
Additional:
     - Moas & Hounds added to 'Modular'
     - Modular tab has been made into 'Legacy' and removed from tracking as it is more of a excessive completionist goal
     - Tennocon 2025 pack items added including glyphs, sigils, cosmetics & more
     - Newest PA gear added to Gear/Blueprints/Items/Cosmetics/Collectables
     - Codex tab tracking optimised & future proofed
     - Item tab tracking optimised & future proofed
     - Collectable tab tracking optimised & future proofed
     - Multiple masks removed from blueprints (as they never were blueprints)
     - Kuva/Tenet tab renamed to Lich Gear
     - Note Regarding 'items becoming impossible to obtain' on main page
     - NEW PERSONAL GOALS TAB
     - VERSION LOG REWORKED TO LOOK BETTER
